name: Cat Fest Pillows With Shrimp Creme (30G)
description: A gorgeous combination of crispy crust and the most delicate natural ocean shrimp puree make this treat a cat?s favorite treat, and the porous structure helps the pet to brush its teeth. Ingredients: cereals, vegetable protein, ocean shrimp, egg yolk, fish meal, Omega 3/6 fatty acids, fruits and vegetables (pomegranate seeds, forest cranberries). Analytical components: crude protein 20%, fats 15%, crude fiber 2.5%, crude ash 4%, moisture ? 10; energy value ? 360 kcal
